ksa_text: Skill in performing model selection and hyperparameter optimization, including grid search, random search, Bayesian optimization, and cross-validation for model performance tuning.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: This skill KSA describes hands-on technical execution that falls below the expected seniority threshold for a Director of Data Engineering (director tier). Execution-level work in AI/ML Engineering is not expected at this level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could real-world Director of Data Engineering practitioners be expected to demonstrate this skill KSA in practice, despite the seniority gap?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: NewVantage Partners CDO Survey, Wavestone CDAIO Report, and Gartner leadership effectiveness research confirm that director-tier roles delegate execution responsibilities to appropriate levels rather than owning them directly.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: seniority-based exclusion is consistent with external evidence on director-tier role expectations. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Seniority mismatch: this skill KSA is below the expected level for the Director of Data Engineering (director tier). Consistently excluded.
